title: lastrea aurita
intro: Lastrea aurita, also known as the auriculated fern or the auriculated lady fern, is a species of fern belonging to the genus Lastrea. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea aurita include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Lastrea aurita typically involve drying the fronds and leaves to make tea or infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
